meta.name: Call Point Stopper
meta.description: Protective cover for manual call points
meta.heroDescription:
UV-stabilised polycarbonate cover for manual call points and electrical switches. Designed to reduce accidental activation while maintaining full access for authorised operation.

Spring-hinged construction. Multiple colour options. Alternative mounting and labelling configurations available.

Intended for installations where protection against misuse or accidental operation is required.

options.FIRE: # IN CASE OF FIRE – LIFT COVER, BREAK GLASS
options.EMERGENCY_DOOR: # IN CASE OF EMERGENCY – LIFT COVER, BREAK GLASS TO OPEN DOOR
options.EMERGENCY_OPERATE: # IN CASE OF EMERGENCY – LIFT COVER, OPERATE DEVICE
options.CL: #CL Custom labelling in Ukrainian or English (NON-RETURNABLE)
